qa_pairs.question: How is RAP membership represented?
qa_pairs.answer: RAP membership is represented as a group in LDAP.

qa_pairs.question: What does RAP membership define?
qa_pairs.answer: RAP membership defines a group of users that are authorized to submit jobs against the RAPI (which is the ID of the RAP) and share files within the same Unix group.

qa_pairs.question: How should a user submit a job to the scheduler on Niagara if they have more than one PI?
qa_pairs.answer: If a user has more than one PI (i.e., more than one group), they must specify a group name as the value of the `--account` option when submitting a job to the scheduler.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended tool for transferring substantial amounts of data to a Niagara cluster for storage allocation?
qa_pairs.answer: For substantial data transfers to a Niagara cluster to use your storage allocation, the use of Globus is strongly recommended.

qa_pairs.question: How can I find the location of a `/project` storage allocation on Niagara?
qa_pairs.answer: The location of a `/project` storage allocation on Niagara should be found by using the environment variable `$PROJECT`.

qa_pairs.question: What does the `$PROJECT` environment variable point to on Niagara?
qa_pairs.answer: On Niagara, the `$PROJECT` environment variable will point to a user-specific directory in the research group's project space.

qa_pairs.question: What does a `/nearline` allocation on Niagara mean?
qa_pairs.answer: A `/nearline` allocation on Niagara means space in HPSS.

qa_pairs.question: How are cloud resources allocated through the Rapid Access Service (RAS) managed?
qa_pairs.answer: Cloud resources allocated via the Rapid Access Service (RAS) use the default RAP.

qa_pairs.question: What is the typical group name convention for RAC RAPs with cloud allocations for research groups?
qa_pairs.answer: For cloud resources allocated to a research group, the group name of RAC RAPs typically takes the form of `crg-profname`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the typical group name convention for RAC RAPs with cloud allocations for research platforms or portals?
qa_pairs.answer: For cloud resources allocated to a research platform or portal, the group name of RAC RAPs typically takes the form of `cpp-profname`.

qa_pairs.question: Who has access to cloud resources granted via a default RAP?
qa_pairs.answer: All activated sponsored user roles are always members of your default RAP. Confirming sponsorship of a user confers on them membership in your default RAP.

qa_pairs.question: Who is added as a member to a RAC RAP for cloud resources by default?
qa_pairs.answer: By default, only the PI is added as a member of a RAP associated with cloud resources allocated via the Resource Allocation Competition.

qa_pairs.question: Can sponsored users or other active Alliance users be added to a RAC RAP for cloud allocations?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, if desired, you can add sponsored users and/or other active Alliance users as members to the RAC RAP for cloud allocations, but only members added to your RAP can use your cloud allocation.

qa_pairs.question: What is the first step to select which users may use your cloud allocation?
qa_pairs.answer: The first step is to log in at https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/.

qa_pairs.question: How do you manage RAP memberships to add users to a cloud allocation?
qa_pairs.answer: From the 'My Account' menu, select 'Manage RAP Memberships', then choose the relevant RAP from the drop-down list.

qa_pairs.question: How can co-PIs and their associated sponsored user roles be added to a cloud RAP in bulk?
qa_pairs.answer: After selecting 'Manage RAP Memberships' and the specific RAP, go to 'Add Members' and click on the 'In bulk' link to add co-PIs and their associated sponsored user roles.

qa_pairs.question: What should you do if a user's name doesn't appear on the 'In bulk' page when adding members to a cloud RAP?
qa_pairs.answer: If the 'In bulk' page does not show the user's name, click 'Cancel' to return to the RAP membership page, then go to the 'Add Members' section and enter the member's CCRI in the 'One by one using a CCRI' field.

qa_pairs.question: What access does a new member automatically gain when added to a RAP for a cloud project?
qa_pairs.answer: Any new member added to a RAP for your cloud project will automatically have access to your cloud allocation.

qa_pairs.question: What options are available for managing members of a Cloud RAP after they have been added?
qa_pairs.answer: After members are added to a Cloud RAP, you can promote members to Managers or remove members at any time.
